lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਬਨਜਾਰੋ ਰਾਮ ਕੋ ਸਹਜ ਕਰਉ ਬੵਾਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: hau banajaaro raam ko sehaj krau bayaapaar |
lines.english: I am the merchant of the Lord; I deal in spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਧਨੁ ਲਾਦਿਆ ਬਿਖੁ ਲਾਦੀ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mai raam naam dhan laadiaa bikh laadee sansaar |2|
lines.english: I have loaded the Wealth of the Lord's Name; the world has loaded poison. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਿ ਜਮ ਡੰਡੁ ਨ ਲਾਗਈ ਤਜੀਲੇ ਸਰਬ ਜੰਜਾਲ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mohi jam ddandd na laagee tajeele sarab janjaal |3|
lines.english: The club of the Messenger of Death shall not strike me, since I have cast off all entanglements. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਰਵਾਰ ਪਾਰ ਕੇ ਦਾਨੀਆ ਲਿਖਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਆਲ ਪਤਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: auravaar paar ke daaneea likh lehu aal pataal |
lines.english: O you who know this world and the world beyond: write whatever nonsense you please about me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਕਸੁੰਭ ਕਾ ਤੈਸਾ ਇਹੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaisaa rang kasunbh kaa taisaa ihu sansaar |
lines.english: Love of this world is like the pale, temporary color of the safflower.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਰਮਈਏ ਰੰਗੁ ਮਜੀਠ ਕਾ ਕਹੁ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਚਮਾਰ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: mere rameee rang majeetth kaa kahu ravidaas chamaar |4|1|
lines.english: The color of my Lord's Love, however, is permanent, like the dye of the madder plant. So says Ravi Daas, the tanner. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਪੂਰਬੀ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree poorabee ravidaas jeeo |
lines.english: Gauree Poorbee, Ravi Daas Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂਪੁ ਭਰਿਓ ਜੈਸੇ ਦਾਦਿਰਾ ਕਛੁ ਦੇਸੁ ਬਿਦੇਸੁ ਨ ਬੂਝ ॥
lines.translit: koop bhario jaise daadiraa kachh des bides na boojh |
lines.english: The frog in the deep well knows nothing of its own country or other lands;

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੇ ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਬਿਮੋਹਿਆ ਕਛੁ ਆਰਾ ਪਾਰੁ ਨ ਸੂਝ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aise meraa man bikhiaa bimohiaa kachh aaraa paar na soojh |1|
lines.english: just so, my mind, infatuated with corruption, understands nothing about this world or the next. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਭਵਨ ਕੇ ਨਾਇਕਾ ਇਕੁ ਛਿਨੁ ਦਰਸੁ ਦਿਖਾਇ ਜੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sagal bhavan ke naaeikaa ik chhin daras dikhaae jee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O Lord of all worlds: reveal to me, even for an instant, the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲਿਨ ਭਈ ਮਤਿ ਮਾਧਵਾ ਤੇਰੀ ਗਤਿ ਲਖੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: malin bhee mat maadhavaa teree gat lakhee na jaae |
lines.english: My intellect is polluted; I cannot understand Your state, O Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਹੁ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਚੂਕਈ ਮੈ ਸੁਮਤਿ ਦੇਹੁ ਸਮਝਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: karahu kripaa bhram chookee mai sumat dehu samajhaae |2|
lines.english: Take pity on me, dispel my doubts, and teach me true wisdom. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੀਸਰ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਨਹੀ ਤੁਅ ਗੁਣ ਕਥਨੁ ਅਪਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jogeesar paaveh nahee tua gun kathan apaar |
lines.english: Even the great Yogis cannot describe Your Glorious Virtues; they are beyond words.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਭਗਤਿ ਕੈ ਕਾਰਣੈ ਕਹੁ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਚਮਾਰ ॥੩॥੧॥
lines.translit: prem bhagat kai kaaranai kahu ravidaas chamaar |3|1|
lines.english: I am dedicated to Your loving devotional worship, says Ravi Daas the tanner. ||3||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਬੈਰਾਗਣਿ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree bairaagan |
lines.english: Gauree Bairaagan:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਨੌ ਜੁਗ ਤੀਨੌ ਦਿੜੇ ਕਲਿ ਕੇਵਲ ਨਾਮ ਅਧਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: teenau jug teenau dirre kal keval naam adhaar |1|
lines.english: In those three ages, people held to these three ways. But in the Iron Age of Kali Yuga, the Name of the Lord is your only Support. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਜੁਗਿ ਸਤੁ ਤੇਤਾ ਜਗੀ ਦੁਆਪਰਿ ਪੂਜਾਚਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: satajug sat tetaa jagee duaapar poojaachaar |
lines.english: In the Golden Age of Sat Yuga, was Truth; in the Silver Age of Trayta Yuga, charitable feasts; in the Brass Age of Dwaapar Yuga, there was worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰੁ ਕੈਸੇ ਪਾਇਬੋ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: paar kaise paaeibo re |
lines.english: How can I swim across?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੇ ਆਵਾ ਗਵਨੁ ਬਿਲਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa te aavaa gavan bilaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: so that I might understand how I can escape reincarnation. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋ ਸਉ ਕੋਊ ਨ ਕਹੈ ਸਮਝਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mo sau koaoo na kahai samajhaae |
lines.english: No one has explained to me,

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਧਰਮ ਨਿਰੂਪੀਐ ਕਰਤਾ ਦੀਸੈ ਸਭ ਲੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bahu bidh dharam niroopeeai karataa deesai sabh loe |
lines.english: So many forms of religion have been described; the whole world is practicing them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨ ਕਰਮ ਤੇ ਛੂਟੀਐ ਜਿਹ ਸਾਧੇ ਸਭ ਸਿਧਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kavan karam te chhootteeai jih saadhe sabh sidh hoe |2|
lines.english: What actions will bring emancipation, and total perfection? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਅਕਰਮ ਬੀਚਾਰੀਐ ਸੰਕਾ ਸੁਨਿ ਬੇਦ ਪੁਰਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: karam akaram beechaareeai sankaa sun bed puraan |
lines.english: One may distinguish between good and evil actions, and listen to the Vedas and the Puraanas,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਸਾ ਸਦ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਬਸੈ ਕਉਨੁ ਹਿਰੈ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sansaa sad hiradai basai kaun hirai abhimaan |3|
lines.english: but doubt still persists. Skepticism continually dwells in the heart, so who can eradicate egotistical pride? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਹਰੁ ਉਦਕਿ ਪਖਾਰੀਐ ਘਟ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਬਿਬਿਧਿ ਬਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: baahar udak pakhaareeai ghatt bheetar bibidh bikaar |
lines.english: Outwardly, he washes with water, but deep within, his heart is tarnished by all sorts of vices.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਧ ਕਵਨ ਪਰ ਹੋਇਬੋ ਸੁਚ ਕੁੰਚਰ ਬਿਧਿ ਬਿਉਹਾਰ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sudh kavan par hoeibo such kunchar bidh biauhaar |4|
lines.english: So how can he become pure? His method of purification is like that of an elephant, covering himself with dust right after his bath! ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਵਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸ ਰਜਨੀ ਜਥਾ ਗਤਿ ਜਾਨਤ ਸਭ ਸੰਸਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: rav pragaas rajanee jathaa gat jaanat sabh sansaar |
lines.english: With the rising of the sun, the night is brought to its end; the whole world knows this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਮ ਪਰਸ ਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟੀਐ ਪੂਰਬ ਲਿਖਤ ਲਿਲਾਟ ॥
lines.translit: param paras gur bhetteeai poorab likhat lilaatt |
lines.english: When one meets the Supreme Philosopher's Stone, the Guru, if such pre-ordained destiny is written on one's forehead,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਸ ਮਾਨੋ ਤਾਬੋ ਛੁਏ ਕਨਕ ਹੋਤ ਨਹੀ ਬਾਰ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: paaras maano taabo chhue kanak hot nahee baar |5|
lines.english: It is believed that with the touch of the Philosopher's Stone, copper is immediately transformed into gold. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਨਮਨ ਮਨ ਮਨ ਹੀ ਮਿਲੇ ਛੁਟਕਤ ਬਜਰ ਕਪਾਟ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: aunaman man man hee mile chhuttakat bajar kapaatt |6|
lines.english: then the soul blends with the Supreme Soul, and the stubborn doors are opened wide. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਮਤਿ ਸਤਿ ਕਰੀ ਭ੍ਰਮ ਬੰਧਨ ਕਾਟਿ ਬਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat jugat mat sat karee bhram bandhan kaatt bikaar |
lines.english: Through the way of devotion, the intellect is imbued with Truth; doubts, entanglements and vices are cut away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਬਸਿ ਰਸਿ ਮਨ ਮਿਲੇ ਗੁਨ ਨਿਰਗੁਨ ਏਕ ਬਿਚਾਰ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: soee bas ras man mile gun niragun ek bichaar |7|
lines.english: The mind is restrained, and one attains joy, contemplating the One Lord, who is both with and without qualities. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਭਗਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਊਪਜੈ ਤਾ ਤੇ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਉਦਾਸ ॥੮॥੧॥
lines.translit: prem bhagat nahee aoopajai taa te ravidaas udaas |8|1|
lines.english: Love and devotion have not welled up within me, and so Ravi Daas is sad and depressed. ||8||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਜਤਨ ਨਿਗ੍ਰਹ ਕੀਏ ਟਾਰੀ ਨ ਟਰੈ ਭ੍ਰਮ ਫਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: anik jatan nigrah kee ttaaree na ttarai bhram faas |
lines.english: I have tried many methods, but by turning it away, the noose of doubt is not turned away.
